beer.beer_description: Clarence Hazy Pale Ale is an easy drinking hazy pale ale. Embracing the obsession with opacity, low bitterness and obscene levels of dry hopping as well as some new technology in the form of Subzero HopKief™ - Clarence combines a full pillowy mouthfeel with an array of fruity hop profiles to bring you a truly modern drinking experience. Pair with your favourite naan pocket for a good time.

items.checkin_comment: Good - not an ale man - but that was good. Wanted to try something different so I did and I wasn’t disappointed but I must say it did unfortunately get worse as it went on but it was still a strong start.

items.badge_description: Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 80 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower. Try 5 more for Level 17!
It takes the perfect amount of light, the right framing and a touch of creative love to get the perfect picture of your brew. Now it’s time to drink it! That’s 90 check-ins with a photo.

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 95 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 20!

beer.beer_description: Clarence Hazy Pale Ale is an easy drinking hazy pale ale. Pair with your favourite naan pocket for a good time.

items.badge_description: There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 105 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 22!
Ahh, the trusty pale ale; crisp, refreshing, and always a good choice in a bind. That's 85 different Pale Ales or American Pale Wheats. Try 5 more for Level 18.
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 15 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 4.

Pair with your favourite naan pocket for a good time.

items.badge_description: Wine isn't the only beverage worthy of pairing with a delicious meal. With so many styles widely available, there’s a perfect pint for any cuisine of your choosing. That's a beer at 20 different venues categorized as a Restaurant. Try 5 more for Level 5!

There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 140 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 29!

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 100 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 21!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 430 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 87!

items.checkin_comment:
Tommies and tries day at West Harbour. Clarence looks big but his defence is poor. To many tries let in today. I blame you, Clarence! Shoulders on in contact, don’t be soft!
Oh - also, good beer. Quite enjoyable.
